title: Delicately Smoky Kenyan Chicken Kebabs
description: A fresh and aerated Kenyan dish featuring smoky a oli and tandoor flavors, perfect for a healthy meal prep option, this recipe is onion and garlic free and cooked to perfection in banana leaves.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat, around 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoky a oli, tandoor spice blend, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Wrap each skewer in a banana leaf and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
